title: Rockingham Forge Sister Straight Nail Scissors 4cm Stainless Steel Blade - Tortoise Shell Effect Handle – Small Sharp Scissors for Nails, Toenails & Eyebrows
features: NAIL SCISSORS: A small pair of 4cm flat bladed scissors ideal for cutting finger and toe nails.
LUXURY TORTOISE SHELL DESIGN: Add a touch of vintage style luxury to any home with these premium tortoise shell effect handles and stainless steel blades.
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: These ultra sharp stainless steel blades with robust build quality means they will stand the test of time.
ERGONOMIC DESIGN: The ergonomic handles provide excellent grip and comfort making them the perfect choice for a variety of household tasks.

VARIETY OF STYLES: Explore the complete collection Sister Scissors: large embroidery scissors, nail scissors, sewing scissors, household scissors, hairdressing scissors, dressmaking scissors, kitchen scissors, side bent scissors and wallpaper scissors.

Dressmaking Scissors Wallpaper Scissors Embroidery Scissors Kitchen Scissors Household Scissors Nail Scissors Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 872 4.5 out of 5 stars 872 4.5 out of 5 stars 872 4.5 out of 5 stars 872 4.5 out of 5 stars 872 4.5 out of 5 stars 872 Price — no data — no data — no data — no data — no data £2.50 £ 2 . 50 Blade Length (") 21.5 cm 25 cm 11 cm 20 cm 15 cm 1.57 inches Acrylic Handle ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Main Use Dress and clothes design Cutting wallpaper to size, home design Knitting, sewing, embroidery Food preparation, opening packaging, general use Multipurpose use around the home Trimming finger and toe nails Right Handed ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Sisters: A Rockingham Forge Range by Grunwerg Rockingham Forge takes the history of Sheffield knife making and incorporates the materials and manufacturing techniques into modern designs. Since 1948 Grunwerg have proudly manufactured knives and scissors in the heart of Sheffield, the steel city and the centre of cutlery production in the UK. Whilst the factory closed in the 1970's the business moved to Rockingham Street, where it remained until 2019, designing and supplying cutlery and kitchen knives. Discover Rockingham Forge's extensive range of high-quality knives, chopping boards, knife sharpeners, scissors and more.
